name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month, inconsistent reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent roll reporting instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem_solved: Inconsistent and delayed rent roll reports lead to cash flow gaps.
